subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! I am infinitely pleased, joyful and content with the friends of that land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء از یاران آن کشور بی نهایت راضی و مسرورم و خوشنود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
